'''lamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jumblingly|jumblingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jumblingly|jumblingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lamate|lamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lamatesher|lamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lamatesherĂ«m|lamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lamatero|lamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lamateshĂ«|lamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lamateshĂ«m|lamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilamatero|gokilamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilamateshĂ«|gokilamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilamateshĂ«m|gokilamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golamankerom|golamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golamankeshĂ«|golamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golamankeshĂ«m|golamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golamankeya|golamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lamaterom|lamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lamatemu|lamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lamateya|lamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilamaterom|gokilamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilamatemu|gokilamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilamateya|gokilamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lamamate|lamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lamamatesher|lamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lamamatesherĂ«m|lamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lamamatero|lamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lamamateshĂ«|lamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lamamateshĂ«m|lamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilamamatero|gokilamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilamamateshĂ«|gokilamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilamamateshĂ«m|gokilamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golamamankerom|golamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golamamankeshĂ«|golamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golamamankeshĂ«m|golamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golamamankeya|golamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lamamaterom|lamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lamamatemu|lamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lamamateya|lamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilamamaterom|gokilamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilamamatemu|gokilamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilamamateya|gokilamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠte|lĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠtesher|lĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠtero|lĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠmĂŠtero|gokilĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠmĂŠnkerom|golĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠmĂŠnkeya|golĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠterom|lĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠtemu|lĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠmĂŠteya|lĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠmĂŠterom|gokilĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠmĂŠteya|gokilĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafmafte|lafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafmaftesher|lafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafmaftesherĂ«m|lafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafmaftero|lafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafmafteshĂ«|lafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafmafteshĂ«m|lafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafmaftero|gokilafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafmafteshĂ«|gokilafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafmafteshĂ«m|gokilafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafmafnkerom|golafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafmafnkeshĂ«|golafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafmafnkeshĂ«m|golafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafmafnkeya|golafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafmafterom|lafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafmaftemu|lafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafmafteya|lafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafmafterom|gokilafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafmaftemu|gokilafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafmafteya|gokilafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
